message:
test(token_bucket): add telemetry counter tests [ft-3kxe.23]

Add 9 inline unit tests covering acquires, refills, resets,
rate_changes counters, serde roundtrip, and combined operation
scenarios. Add 8 proptest invariant tests verifying counter
accuracy (acquires == attempts, granted + denied == total),
consistency with total_consumed, reset survival, and snapshot
serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
